name: Hortosoupa (Vegetable Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, clean, and chop the potatoes, onions, carrots, and celery.
2. Add the chopped vegetables to a pot with 10 cups of water and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
4. Add salt and tomatoes (if using ripe tomatoes, pierce them first) and continue cooking for an additional 30 to 45 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
5. Remove the pot from the heat.
6. Puree or strain the cooked vegetables through a blender or food processor.
7. Return the purée or strained mixture back to the pot.
8. Add a pinch of pepper and stir in the shortening or oil.
9. Serve hot, garnished with croutons if desired.
